heroHeadline: CJNG Succession Crisis Week 7 — 132,828 Missing, UN Escalates to General Assembly
heroSubtitle: El Mencho killed Feb 22. O3 leads CJNG council; El Jardinero at large. Sinaloa civil war ongoing. UN finds Mexico disappearances may be crimes against humanity.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
